content:
ANTHONY: And it starts with Tomb of the Unknowns—your Marines, your perspectives, your precision—made LIVE and responsive for the people who need to interact with it most.

---

NEXT STEPS

ANTHONY: Read this. Sit with it. Don't respond immediately.

When you have capacity (end of Carolinas trip, whenever), we schedule 45 minutes:
- I walk through the system conceptually (no PowerPoint)
- Show you the working prototype (5 min video)
- Ask: "What dramaturgical questions does this raise?"
- Listen more than pitch

No commitment. Just conversation.

If interested, we sketch Phase 1 together—how we work, cadence, what success looks like.

AI: Available resources: working demos, documented precedent research, grant timelines, technical specifications, architectural documentation accumulated over 12 months of development.

ANTHONY: Interested in being first?

—Anthony (with AI assist from Perplexity)
